title: Racosperma anaticeps
taxonomy: Racosperma anaticeps is classified within the family Fabaceae, which includes a wide range of legume species. The genus Racosperma is a synonym for the genus Acacia, so it's often classified as Acacia anaticeps. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and phylogenetic relationships with other plants. Racosperma anaticeps is a part of the subfamily Mimosoideae, which contains many species of thorny trees and shrubs. The classification of Racosperma anaticeps is subject to ongoing research and revision in the field of botany.
